title: arabis caucasica subsp. brevifolia
intro: Arabis caucasica subsp. brevifolia, also known as Caucasian rockcress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arabis caucasica subsp. brevifolia include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and antioxidant defenses. Arabis caucasica subsp. brevifolia is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
